title: Junior Revenue Manager at EazyDiner Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at EazyDiner Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EazyDiner Ventures Solutions:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
